title: Night Desk — Training & Experiments
blurb: Post-training pokes via Thinking Machines Tinker (LoRA + RL). Heavy weights stay off this site; this board is the public ledger of what the desk tried.
roadmap: Multi-step PPO on desk-coffee reward until mean reward moves cleanly
Principle rewards (signed voice, no real-name on X)
Optional: serve a chat widget against a published adapter

experiments.title: Desk coffee PPO poke
experiments.summary: End-to-end Tinker loop closed. Toy reward for coffee/desk words. One optim step — validated the path, not a personality.
experiments.notes: PPO has no weights tensor; mask prompts with advantages=0. Prefer cheap models before Inkling.
